summary: The diff implements REQ-10 (featured hero section replacement) and partially addresses REQ-11 (admin operations via frontend hooks). However, REQ-11's backend Motoko actor changes are not visible in the diff, and REQ-12 (seeding sample articles in the backend) shows no evidence of implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the backend Motoko actor fully supports all admin operations (create, update, delete, publish, archive) with role-based access control, add/remove admin principal functions, all callable from frontend.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to backend/main.mo are present in the diff. The diff only shows frontend file changes (HomePage.tsx, frontend-file-summaries.txt, project_state.json). While useQueries.ts is mentioned in the file summaries as containing admin mutations, there is no evidence that the Motoko backend itself was updated to enforce admin principal checks or expose addAdmin/removeAdmin functions.

missing_requirements.requirement: Seed the backend with at least 6 sample published articles spanning all categories and content types, with at least one featured article.
missing_requirements.reason: No backend seeding logic is present in the diff. There are no additions to backend/main.mo or any seed data file. The diff contains no evidence of sample articles being added to the backend.
